/usr/bin/cc -fPIC -O3 -DNDEBUG -flto=auto -fno-fat-lto-objects -Wl,--version-script="/home/hong/workspace/wos_gino/MCGINO/bindings/zombie_Laplace/deps/tbb/src/tbbmalloc/def/lin64-tbbmalloc.def" -Wl,-z,relro,-z,now,-z,noexecstack -shared -Wl,-soname,libtbbmalloc.so.2 -o ../../../../gnu_11.4_cxx11_64_release/libtbbmalloc.so.2.16 CMakeFiles/tbbmalloc.dir/backend.cpp.o CMakeFiles/tbbmalloc.dir/backref.cpp.o CMakeFiles/tbbmalloc.dir/frontend.cpp.o CMakeFiles/tbbmalloc.dir/large_objects.cpp.o CMakeFiles/tbbmalloc.dir/tbbmalloc.cpp.o CMakeFiles/tbbmalloc.dir/__/tbb/itt_notify.cpp.o  -ldl
